name: Golden Cash Exchange (We Buy Gold)
description_short: San Antonio precious metals and luxury goods buyer specializing in gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, and high-end watches. Offers free appraisals and immediate cash payouts.
description_long:
Golden Cash Exchange operates as a specialized precious metals and luxury goods buyer based in San Antonio, Texas. The company focuses on purchasing items of intrinsic value, with particular expertise in gold, silver, platinum, and palladium in various forms. Their business model centers on providing immediate cash transactions for customers looking to sell valuable items without the complexity of traditional resale channels.

The company purchases an extensive range of precious metals including jewelry (new, damaged, or scrap), bullion coins and bars, foreign currency coins, certified coins graded by NGC and PCGS, dental gold, and collectible coins spanning from historical U.S. Liberty coins to international sovereign coins like Canadian Maple Leafs and Austrian Philharmonics. Beyond metals, they buy diamonds and colored stones (2+ carats with certification), high-end watches including Rolex, Omega, and Cartier, luxury handbags from Louis Vuitton and Chanel, and collectibles such as vintage firearms, comic books, and vintage toys.

Golden Cash Exchange distinguishes itself through comprehensive precious metals expertise, free appraisals and estimates at multiple locations, and immediate cash-only payouts. Their buyer accepts items in any condition—broken, damaged, or unwanted—and explicitly states they will make offers on "anything of high value." The detailed inventory list suggests knowledgeable staff capable of evaluating specialized items like placer gold, class rings, and certified collectible coins.

The primary limitation is that this is a local San Antonio business without evidence of online shipping or remote transactions. Customers must visit physical locations for appraisals and transactions. The website provides extensive product categories but minimal information about pricing methodology, dealer credentials, or company history. No consumer reviews, Better Business Bureau rating, or third-party verification is presented.
pros: Accepts precious metals in any condition: broken, damaged, scrap, and unwanted jewelry
Free appraisals and estimates at multiple locations with no obligation
All payouts made in cash immediately—no checks, transfers, or waiting periods
Purchases specialized items most pawn shops decline: placer gold, NGC/PCGS certified coins, class rings, dental gold
Wide range of accepted precious metals beyond gold: silver, platinum, palladium, and rhodium
Accepts luxury goods beyond metals: Rolex watches, Louis Vuitton/Chanel bags, vintage firearms and collectibles
Explicitly states willingness to make offers on any high-value items, not limited to listed categories
cons: Local San Antonio business only—no evidence of online sales, shipping, or remote appraisals for non-local customers
Website provides no pricing transparency, dealer credentials, certifications, or posted spot prices for comparison
No visible customer reviews, Better Business Bureau ratings, or third-party verification of business practices
No information about buyback policies, price locks, or dispute resolution if customer disagrees with appraisal
Website lists what they buy but not the percentage of spot price offered or pricing methodology
best_for: Precious metals collectors and investors liquidating gold, silver, or specialty coins quickly for cash
Estate executors managing jewelry, coins, and collectibles from inheritance sales
Individuals with luxury watches or high-end accessories needing quick local cash without shipping hassles
Collectors of numismatic coins or specialized bullion with certified or rare items to sell
diagnosis: Golden Cash Exchange is best for San Antonio-area customers with precious metals, coins, luxury watches, or collectibles who need quick cash and prefer in-person transactions with free appraisals. The main caveat is that this is strictly a local business with no remote purchasing capability, no posted pricing transparency, and no visible third-party credibility verification—customers must visit in person and accept whatever offer is made without price comparison.
services: Gold coin and bullion purchase (Eagles, Maples, Pandas, Krugerrands, Sovereigns, foreign coins)
Silver coin and bullion purchase (Eagles, Maples, Morgan dollars, pre-1964 coins, bars, and rounds)
Platinum and palladium coin and bullion purchase
Precious metals jewelry buying (new, damaged, scrap, designer, and custom gold/silver/platinum)
Dental gold purchase (caps, bridges, grills, and noble metals)
Diamond and colored stone purchase (2+ carats with GIA/EGL certification)
High-end watch purchase (Rolex, Omega, Cartier, running or non-running condition)
Collectibles purchase (vintage firearms, comic books, vintage toys, estate collections)
Free appraisals and estimates at multiple locations
Class rings, college rings, and championship rings purchase (all precious metals)
Estate jewelry, coins, and collection evaluation and purchase
